l3_context_links_confidence_check.name: l3_context_links_confidence_check
l3_context_links_confidence_check.value: confidence IS NULL OR (confidence >= 0 AND confidence <= 1)

l3_occurrences_offset_check.name: l3_occurrences_offset_check
l3_occurrences_offset_check.value: (start_offset IS NULL AND end_offset IS NULL) OR (start_offset IS NOT NULL AND end_offset IS NOT NULL AND start_offset >= 0 AND end_offset >= start_offset)

l3_occurrences_confidence_check.name: l3_occurrences_confidence_check
l3_occurrences_confidence_check.value: confidence IS NULL OR (confidence >= 0 AND confidence <= 1)

l3_proposal_items_active_entity_type_che.name: l3_proposal_items_active_entity_type_check
l3_proposal_items_active_entity_type_che.value: active_entity_type IS NULL OR active_entity_type = ANY (ARRAY['source'::text, 'context'::text, 'occurrence'::text, 'context_link'::text])

llm_usage_reservation_lifecycle_check.name: llm_usage_reservation_lifecycle_check
llm_usage_reservation_lifecycle_check.value: (status = 'settled' AND provider <> '__reservation__' AND expires_at IS NULL) OR (status = 'pending' AND provider = '__reservation__' AND expires_at IS NOT NULL AND finalized_at IS NULL) OR (status = ANY (ARRAY['released'::text, 'expired'::text]) AND provider = '__reservation__' AND expires_at IS NOT NULL AND finalized_at IS NOT NULL)

outbox_events_attempts_check.name: outbox_events_attempts_check
outbox_events_attempts_check.value: attempts >= 0 AND max_attempts > 0 AND attempts <= max_attempts

l2_paused_reason_check.name: l2_paused_reason_check
l2_paused_reason_check.value: l2_paused_reason IS NULL OR l2_paused_reason = ANY (ARRAY['l1_cascade_failure'::text, 'wordbook_focus'::text, 'manual'::text])

wordbook_items_via_wordbook.name: wordbook_items_via_wordbook
wordbook_items_via_wordbook.using:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM wordbooks w
  WHERE ((w.id = wordbook_items.wordbook_id) AND (w.user_id = auth.uid()))))
wordbook_items_via_wordbook.withCheck:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM wordbooks w
  WHERE ((w.id = wordbook_items.wordbook_id) AND (w.user_id = auth.uid()))))

generated.as: to_tsvector('english'::regconfig, ((((((((((COALESCE(lemma, ''::text) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(title, ''::text)) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(short_definition, ''::text)) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(definition_md, ''::text)) || ' '::text) || COALESCE((metadata ->> 'semantic_field'::text), ''::text)) || ' '::text) || COALESCE((metadata ->> 'word_freq'::text), ''::text)))
